task_completion.description: Configure the document in landscape orientation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer document page appears wider than it is tall, indicating landscape orientation.

task_completion.description: Set up a three-column layout with spacing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document displays three distinct vertical columns, visible via text boundaries, the top ruler showing three sections, or the column configuration dialog.

task_completion.description: Incorporate the provided text content into the brochure
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text such as 'Spring 2026 Wellness Expo', 'Mercy General Health System', or 'outreach@mercygeneral.org' is visible within the document's columns.

task_completion.description: Format headings to be bold and distinct
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings like 'Event Schedule' and 'About Us' are formatted in bold text and visually stand out from the regular body paragraphs.

task_completion.description: Place the logo in the right column and the activity photo in the center column
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two images are present: a logo image ('wellness_logo.png') is located in the rightmost column (front panel), and a photo ('photo_activity.jpg') is located in the middle column (center panel).

task_completion.description: Save the final document with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer title bar displays 'wellness_expo_brochure.odt' or a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/wellness_expo_brochure.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenOffice Writer menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes rather than generating the ODT file entirely via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window, icons, and menus clearly belong to Apache OpenOffice Writer, not LibreOffice, Microsoft Word, or a plain text editor.
The trajectory shows a logical progression of opening a blank document, pasting text, adjusting layout, and inserting images, rather than just opening a pre-made completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final document must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/wellness_expo_brochure.odt'. The document must be in landscape orientation and feature exactly 3 columns. It must contain exactly 2 images: 'wellness_logo.png' (must be in the right column) and 'photo_activity.jpg' (must be in the center column). Required text content includes 'Spring 2026 Wellness Expo', 'Mercy General Health System', 'Healthy Cooking Demonstration', and 'outreach@mercygeneral.org'.
